name: ricochet-robots
author: cristian-milea
description: Ricochet Robots — slide a robot till it crashes; reach the target in the fewest moves.
long_description: A single-player take on the board game Ricochet Robots. Robots slide until they crash into a wall, the arena edge, the center block, or another robot — they never stop mid-track. Land the matching shape on its target cell in as few moves as the on-device solver's optimum. Colours become four distinct drawn shapes (circle / square / triangle / diamond) for the 1-bit e-ink. Boards are generated on the device with L-shaped walls and verified solvable by a breadth-first solver; pick Easy / Medium / Hard and a board size before generating. Random mode reseeds every time; daily mode gives everyone the same board for a given size and difficulty each day.
